hero.tagline: If you can imagine it, you can create it. If you can learn it, you can achieve it.

about.title: About Me
about.label: About Me
about.sp2Desc: Building end-to-end web applications with modern frontend and backend technologies
about.sp3Desc: Using AI as a catalyst to quickly master new technologies and solve complex problems
about.sp4Desc: Turning complex challenges into elegant, practical solutions through analytical thinking
about.para1: Currently in my sixth semester of Systems Engineering, I have developed a foundation in software development, databases, and interactive experiences. My focus is on building efficient, scalable, and visually appealing solutions that solve real problems.
about.para2: I believe technology should be powerful and beautiful, which is why I leverage AI to enhance my skills and efficiently learn what I am passionate about.
about.para3: I am currently exploring everything that allows me to learn and improve in all technology-related fields, such as AI, software development, system design, and interactive experiences.
about.philosophy: As long as you keep trying, no failure will be final; each one will be an opportunity to learn, grow and be better than yesterday.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: Work
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects that showcase creating high-performance, visually appealing digital experiences.

yomessage.title: YoMessage
yomessage.description: Real-time messaging app with a stunning, fully customizable UI. Built with React 19, Express 5, Socket.IO, MongoDB, and Clerk Auth.

geminiclone.title: Google Gemini Clone
geminiclone.description: Immersive 3D collaboration platform for remote teams with virtual environments and real-time avatar interactions.

nexbitshop.title: Nexbit Shop
nexbitshop.description: Enterprise-level online component store powering 12 products with over 200 accessible and customizable components.

enterpriseai.title: Enterprise AI Application
enterpriseai.description: Web-based creative coding environment with visual programming interface and real-time preview.

systems-engineering.focus: Software Engineering, Algorithms, Databases, Human-Computer Interaction
